scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "API,VITE" --prefix-colors "cyan,blue" "corepack pnpm run dev:api" "corepack pnpm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:api: cd artifacts/api-server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.dev:client: wait-on http://localhost:3000/api/healthz && cd artifacts/tropicolors && npx vite --config vite.config.ts
scripts.dev:api:wait: wait-on http://localhost:3000/api/health && corepack pnpm run dev:api
scripts.dev:client:wait: wait-on http://localhost:3000/api/health && corepack pnpm run dev:client
